ksa_text: Ability to assess and comprehensively inventory organizational data assets, data flows, and technology resources to inform governance decisions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-A-003 (Data Governance/Ability) scores 0.540 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.540) and is in_scope for the Records Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Records Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.540), and Data Governance handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does NIST AI RMF signal (0.540) for this Data Governance KSA reflect actual Records Manager requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Governance appears in 50-80% of Records Manager job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at manager level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Governance at composite 0.540 is market-validated for Records Manager. Final decision: include.

decision_rationale: KSA DG-A-003 (Data Governance/Ability) scores 0.540 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.540) and is in_scope for the Records Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Records Manager.
